virtualsmsApiKey.description: Your VirtualSMS API key. Get one at https://virtualsms.io/dashboard

defaultTimeoutSeconds.description: Default timeout in seconds for wait_for_sms_code tool

pollingIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds when WebSocket delivery is unavailable

environment.description: API environment — use sandbox for testing without real charges

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency for displaying balances and prices

tools.name: list_services
tools.title: List Available Services
tools.description: Get all available SMS verification services (Telegram, WhatsApp, Google, etc.). Use this to discover valid service codes before buying a number.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.title: List Available Countries
tools.description: Get all available countries for SMS verification. Use this to discover valid country codes before buying a number.

service.description: Filter countries available for a specific service (optional)

tools.name: get_price
tools.title: Check Service Price
tools.description: Check the price and availability for a specific service + country combination. Always check price before buying to confirm availability.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.title: Get Account Balance
tools.description: Check your VirtualSMS account balance in USD. Requires VIRTUALSMS_API_KEY to be set.

currency.description: Display balance in specific currency (default: USD)

tools.name: create_number_order
tools.title: Buy Virtual Number
tools.description: Purchase a virtual phone number for SMS verification. Returns order_id and phone_number. Use check_sms to poll for the verification code, or use wait_for_code to do it automatically.

tools.name: get_sms_code
tools.title: Check SMS Code
tools.description: Check if an SMS verification code has been received for an order. Poll this every 5-10 seconds after buying a number. For automatic polling, use wait_for_code instead.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.title: Cancel Order
tools.description: Cancel an order and request a refund. Only works if no SMS has been received yet. Use this if the service is taking too long or you want to try a different number.

tools.name: wait_for_sms_code
tools.title: Buy Number and Wait for SMS Code
tools.description: RECOMMENDED: One-step tool that buys a number AND waits for the SMS code automatically. Uses real-time WebSocket delivery with automatic polling fallback. Always returns order_id in the response — even on timeout — so you can use check_sms to recover.

timeout_seconds.description: How long to wait for SMS code in seconds (default: 120, max: 600)

annotations.title: Buy Number and Wait for SMS Code

tools.name: find_cheapest_countries
tools.title: Find Cheapest Countries
tools.description: Find the cheapest countries for a given service, sorted by price. Returns available countries with prices and stock levels so you can pick the best deal.

limit.description: Number of cheapest options to return (default: 5)

tools.name: search_services
tools.title: Search Service by Name
tools.description: Find the right service code using natural language. Don't know the exact code? Just search "uber", "binance", "steam" etc. Returns matching services with similarity scores.

tools.name: swap_phone_number
tools.title: Swap Phone Number
tools.description: Swap a phone number on an existing order. Gets a new number for the same service and country without additional charge. Use when the current number isn't receiving SMS.

order_id.description: Order ID to swap — must be in waiting/created status with no SMS received

tools.name: list_active_orders
tools.title: List Active Orders
tools.description: List your active orders. Essential for crash recovery — if your session was interrupted, use this to find pending orders and their phone numbers, then use check_sms to retrieve codes.

resources.name: Quickstart Guide
resources.description: Step-by-step guide to get your first SMS verification code with VirtualSMS MCP.

resources.name: Popular Services Reference
resources.description: Commonly used service codes for WhatsApp, Telegram, Google, and other top services.

resources.name: Pricing Tips
resources.description: Tips on finding the cheapest virtual numbers and maximizing your VirtualSMS budget.

prompts.name: verify-whatsapp
prompts.description: Complete workflow to get a WhatsApp verification code using a virtual number. Finds the cheapest available country, buys a number, and waits for the SMS code automatically.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Preferred country code (e.g. "US", "RU", "IN"). Leave empty to auto-select cheapest.

prompts.name: verify-telegram
prompts.description: Complete workflow to verify a Telegram account with a virtual number. Automatically selects cheapest available country and waits for the SMS code.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Preferred country code (e.g. "US", "RU", "KZ"). Leave empty to auto-select cheapest.

prompts.name: verify-google
prompts.description: Get a Google account verification code via virtual phone number. Useful for creating or recovering Google/Gmail accounts.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Preferred country code (e.g. "US", "GB"). Leave empty to auto-select cheapest.

prompts.name: find-cheapest-number
prompts.description: Find the cheapest virtual phone number for any service. Returns top countries sorted by price with stock availability.

arguments.name: service
arguments.description: Service name or code to find cheapest number for (e.g. "telegram", "whatsapp", "google", "uber")

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Number of cheapest options to show (default: 5)

prompts.name: verify-any-service
prompts.description: Universal SMS verification workflow. Searches for the service by name, finds the cheapest country, buys a number, and waits for the verification code.

arguments.name: country
arguments.description: Preferred country (optional, auto-selects cheapest if not specified)

prompts.name: recover-verification
prompts.description: Recover an interrupted SMS verification session. Lists active orders and checks for pending verification codes — useful after a crash or timeout.

prompts.name: check-account-status
prompts.description: Check your VirtualSMS account balance and list all active orders in one shot.
